title: SapBw4HanaDashboardConnection
description: SAP BW/4HANA Dashboard Connection Config for BEx Query extraction.

hostPort.title: Host and Port
hostPort.description: Host and port of the SAP HANA instance underlying BW/4HANA, e.g. hana-host:30015.

username.title: Username
username.description: HANA database username with access to BW metadata tables.

password.title: Password
password.description: Password for the HANA database user.

abapSchema.title: ABAP Schema
abapSchema.description: Schema name in HANA where BW/4HANA ABAP metadata tables reside (e.g. SAPABAP1).

paginationLimit.title: Pagination Limit
paginationLimit.description: Number of rows fetched per page when querying BW metadata tables.

dashboardFilterPattern.title: Default Dashboard Filter Pattern
dashboardFilterPattern.description: Regex to only include/exclude BEx Queries that match the pattern.

dataModelFilterPattern.title: Default Data Model Filter Pattern
dataModelFilterPattern.description: Regex to only include/exclude BEx Query data models that match the pattern.
